title: Generic Forms of Telecommunications Licences
summary: Publishes generic forms for VSAT, internet exchange, international facilities, international services, mobile, national fixed, internet services and value-added service licences, setting licence condition baselines for market entry.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.licensing: TRA template licence framework for telecom service providers.

notes: Related instruments: Based on Telecommunications Law Articles 29 and 32
